name: phpmyadmin
title: phpMyAdmin
description: Web-based MySQL and MariaDB administration tool with an intuitive interface for managing databases, tables, users, and running SQL queries.

variables.name: HOST_PORT
variables.label: Host Port
variables.description: Port exposed on the host for phpMyAdmin web interface

variables.name: PMA_HOST
variables.label: MySQL Host
variables.description: Hostname or IP of the MySQL/MariaDB server to connect to

variables.name: MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD
variables.label: MySQL Root Password
variables.description: Root password of the MySQL server for initial authentication
